spec.description: Guard proxy observability: span rates, latency (p50/p95), tool call decisions, and raw logs for mcp-tool-guard-proxy. If a panel shows No data — open the ⚙ Debug row first.

spec.title: Guard Proxy Logs
spec.description: Raw log stream from mcp-tool-guard-proxy — allow, deny, and pending decisions

spec.title: Total Span Ingest Rate
spec.description: Broadest possible query — if this is zero, no telemetry is reaching Tempo for this service. Use this to distinguish 'no data ingested' from 'panel filter too narrow'.

spec.title: Span Rate by Name (all spans)
spec.description: Span rate broken down by span name — if 'Total Span Ingest Rate' is non-zero but your target span name is missing here, the span name in your panel filter is wrong or not yet emitted.

spec.title: Error Span Rate
spec.description: Spans with status=error — non-zero here means silent breakages even when total ingest looks healthy.

spec.title: Allow Rate
spec.description: Tool calls allowed by the guard

spec.title: Deny Rate
spec.description: Tool calls blocked by the guard

spec.title: Span Rate Over Time
spec.description: Span rate over time by operation type

spec.title: Tool Call Rate by Tool
spec.description: Rate of tool calls per tool name — which tools are being invoked most

spec.title: Upstream Forward Latency (p50 / p95)
spec.description: P95 latency of mcp.upstream.forward spans — high values mean the upstream MCP server is slow

spec.title: LLM Gemini Latency (p50 / p95)
spec.description: P50/P95 latency of llm.gemini.complete spans — Gemini API response time

spec.title: Denied / Pending Tool Calls
spec.description: Denied and pending tool calls — click a Trace ID to open in Explore

spec.title: MCP Tool Guard Proxy
